description: issue #201: a `right` angle that overflows to `Infinity` (via arithmetic overflow, e.g. `power 10 1000`) raises `ol-range` instead of corrupting the turtle's heading (`Infinity % 360` is `NaN`) — spec/execution-model.md:517's prohibition on learner-facing `NaN`/`Infinity`, same pattern as issue #200's `nonFiniteDistance` guard. The diagnostic's `value` param is JSON-safe (a string, not a raw `Infinity` number).
